canonical_demo_metric_authority.note: Family coordination uses IMC vector authority; local CLI demo variants are non-authoritative for coordination metrics.

multimodal_alignment_assumptions: IoT consumes IMC contract artifacts as static governance inputs, not runtime imports.
Chemosense modality collision and contamination guards (DT-22/DT-27) remain mandatory local gates.
Wave-1 cross-family comparisons use IMC canonical vector metrics for narrative consistency.
wire_compatibility_guarantees: Current IoT decoder preserves backward decode for packet_version=1 fixtures.
Unsupported packet versions are rejected explicitly with deterministic errors.
Strict malformed behavior is enforced via packet compatibility tests and DT-25.
known_divergences: IoT packet framing (0x5A50 + CRC16) is not byte-identical to IMC word-stream framing.
IoT chemosense smoke counts are local validation metrics and do not override IMC canonical demo authority.
WI-1/ZH-1 wrappers are feature-flagged and not default wave-1 wire surface.

breaking_change_policy.family_coordination: Any change affecting word layout markers, packet version semantics, or dispatch assumptions requires explicit wave-note update across IMC/Bio/IoT.

required_now_for_private_staging: current IMC compatibility vector pin remains valid
local family-linkage files remain present and honest
required_only_for_public_release: non-TBD suite interlocks across central/public coordination surfaces
